title: Implementation Brief
description: A self-contained unit of work AND its execution record, one living document. Authors write every required field; the pipeline appends the optional enrichment fields (scout/dev/review per requirement, execution per brief) in place and never rewrites authored fields. The optional shapes mirror scout-report/dev-report/review-report schemas exactly.

id.description: Brief ID: cluster prefix + number (FLOW-001, BUS-003)

cluster.description: Cluster name matching the directory under docs/design/

title.description: Short imperative description of what this brief delivers

depends_on.description: Brief IDs that must land first — direct dependencies only, the dispatcher orders by these

blocked_by.description: External blockers that are not briefs (a pending ADR, an upstream change)

checklist.description: Checklist items this brief covers. Written FIRST, before requirements — coverage is tracked here and must match the union of per-R# checklist arrays in both directions.

stories.description: User stories this brief addresses; same bidirectional coverage rule as checklist

design_anchor.description: ADR IDs that bind this brief. The pipeline projects these decisions into every stage prompt.

purpose.description: What this brief delivers and why it matters — one paragraph; reference the design, don't repeat it

task.description: Plain-language description of the work, read first by the implementing agent. Includes the scope boundary: what's in, what's out.

spec.description: EARS notation for behavioural requirements (WHEN/WHILE/IF ... THE SYSTEM SHALL / SHALL NOT — include the SHALL NOTs, the interesting constraints live in the negative space); plain language for structural ones

acceptance.description: Observable conditions, each writable as an assert statement with concrete inputs and outputs. No ambiguous 'or'. Review lives or dies here.

create.description: Verified against the codebase — false 'create' claims are the most common review finding

checklist.description: C-numbers this requirement delivers — subset of the brief-level array

stories.description: S-numbers this requirement addresses — subset of the brief-level array

scout.description: APPENDED BY THE PIPELINE — scout stage findings for this requirement

files.description: Key files with line ranges, 2-5, not exhaustive

notes.description: Edge cases the brief may not have considered; empty if none

dev.description: APPENDED BY THE PIPELINE — what the dev stage did for this requirement

how.description: How the requirement was met — the rationale, not a diff narration

deviation.description: Empty if the plan was followed; otherwise what changed and why

review.description: APPENDED BY THE PIPELINE — the adversarial review verdict for this requirement

evidence.description: What in the actual diff proves it — file:line or test name, not the dev's claim

acceptance.description: One entry per acceptance criterion — a single boolean for the whole R# is not a review

issues.description: Everything found — there is no severity field because there are no minor issues

fixes.description: What the harden pass changed in response

boundaries.description: SHALL NOT statements — scope protection against over-reach into future briefs' work

verification.description: Cross-cutting checks for the whole brief, complementing per-R# acceptance

execution.description: APPENDED BY THE PIPELINE — the run-level record. The gate block holds what the workflow MEASURED; the attestation block holds what the dev agent BELIEVED. Divergence between them is review signal.

workflow_id.description: The aion workflow id — the durable event history for this run

branch.description: The stacked branch the work rode

session_id.description: Deterministic agent session id (crash-resume resumes this session)

fix_rounds.description: How many gate-failure fix rounds it took to come clean

review_verdict.description: The human (or quorum) verdict from the review signal

landed_commit.description: Commit hash on the target branch; empty until landed

merged_into.description: The branch landed into; empty until landed
